sentences.target: Je prends une photo pour le touriste.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ yn fɔto puʁ lə tuʁist/

translations.fr: Je prends une photo pour le touriste.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ yn fɔto puʁ lə tuʁist/
translations.en: I'm taking a photo for the tourist.
translations.es: Le hago una foto al turista.
translations.de: Ich mache ein Foto für den Touristen.
translations.it: Faccio una foto per il turista.
translations.pt: Estou tirando uma foto para o turista.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chụp ảnh cho du khách.
translations.nl: Ik maak een foto voor de toerist.
translations.hi: मैं पर्यटक के लिए तस्वीर खींच रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βγάζω μια φωτογραφία για τον τουρίστα.
translations.nb: Jeg tar et bilde for turisten.
translations.sv: Jag tar ett foto åt turisten.
translations.da: Jeg tager et billede for turisten.
translations.ja: 観光客のために写真を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'une photo' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'photo'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing a benefactive prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'touriste'.
Common noun, masculine singular here (signaled by 'le'); object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.vi: Bạn là khách du lịch ở đây.
translations.ja: あなたはここでは観光客です。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person plural/formal.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person plural; links subject to predicate nominal.
Common noun used as a bare predicate nominal after the copula; gender not overtly marked here.
Adverb of place indicating location.

sentences.target: On attend derrière la touriste à la caisse.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ dɛʁjɛʁ la tuʁist a la kɛs/

translations.fr: On attend derrière la touriste à la caisse.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ dɛʁjɛʁ la tuʁist a la kɛs/
translations.en: We're waiting behind the tourist at the checkout.
translations.es: Estamos esperando detrás de la turista en la caja.
translations.de: Wir warten an der Kasse hinter der Touristin.
translations.it: Aspettiamo dietro la turista alla cassa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在收银台排在那位女游客后面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺收銀處排喺嗰位女遊客後面。
translations.ru: Мы ждём у кассы позади туристки.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando atrás da turista no caixa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ phía sau nữ du khách ở quầy tính tiền.
translations.ar: نحن ننتظر خلف السائحة عند صندوق الدفع.
translations.nl: We wachten bij de kassa achter de toerist.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо біля каси за туристкою.
translations.hu: A pénztárnál a turista mögött várakozunk.
translations.hi: हम कैश काउंटर पर पर्यटक के पीछे इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Περιμένουμε στο ταμείο πίσω από την τουρίστρια.
translations.nb: Vi venter ved kassen bak turisten.
translations.id: Kami menunggu di belakang turis di kasir.
translations.sv: Vi väntar bakom turisten i kassan.
translations.ro: Așteptăm la casa de marcat în spatele turistei.
translations.da: Vi venter ved kassen bag turisten.
translations.ja: レジでその女性観光客の後ろで待っています.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, impersonal/colloquial 'we', grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here used without an explicit direct object, with PP modifiers.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'touriste'.
Common noun, feminine singular here (signaled by 'la'); object of the preposition 'derrière'.
Preposition marking location.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'caisse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; denotes the cash desk/checkout, complement of 'à'.

sentences.target: Il parle anglais avec une touriste perdue.
sentences.reading: /il paʁl ɑ̃ɡlɛ avɛk yn tuʁist pɛʁdy/

translations.fr: Il parle anglais avec une touriste perdue.
translations.ipa: /il paʁl ɑ̃ɡlɛ avɛk yn tuʁist pɛʁdy/
translations.en: He speaks English with a lost tourist.
translations.es: Él habla inglés con una turista perdida.
translations.de: Er spricht Englisch mit einer verirrten Touristin.
translations.it: Parla inglese con una turista smarrita.
translations.ko: 그는 길을 잃은 관광객과 영어로 이야기해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他正用英语和一位迷路的女游客交谈。
translations.yue: 佢用英文同一位迷路嘅女遊客傾偈。
translations.ru: Он говорит по-английски с заблудившейся туристкой.
translations.pt: Ele fala inglês com uma turista perdida.
translations.he: הוא מדבר אנגלית עם תיירת אבודה.
translations.tr: Kaybolmuş bir turist ile İngilizce konuşuyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang nói tiếng Anh với một nữ du khách bị lạc.
translations.ar: إنه يتحدث الإنجليزية مع سائحة تائهة.
translations.nl: Hij spreekt Engels met een verdwaalde toeriste.
translations.uk: Він розмовляє англійською з заблукалою туристкою.
translations.hi: वह एक खोई हुई महिला पर्यटक से अंग्रेज़ी में बात कर रहा है.
translations.pl: On rozmawia po angielsku z zagubioną turystką.
translations.el: Μιλάει αγγλικά με μια χαμένη τουρίστρια.
translations.nb: Han snakker engelsk med en bortkommen turist.
translations.id: Dia berbicara bahasa Inggris dengan seorang turis yang tersesat.
translations.sv: Han pratar engelska med en vilsen turist.
translations.ro: El vorbește în engleză cu o turistă rătăcită.
translations.da: Han taler engelsk med en vildfaren turist.
translations.fi: Hän puhuu englantia eksyneen turistin kanssa.
translations.ja: 彼は道に迷った女性観光客と英語で話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'anglais' as a bare object denoting language.
Common noun referring to the English language; direct object of 'parle'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'touriste'.
Common noun, feminine singular here (signaled by 'une'); object of the preposition 'avec'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular; agrees with and modifies 'touriste'.
